mapper.select: select a.resource_id, a.system_code, a.resource_biz_type, a.resource_type, a.resource_name, a.resource_desc, a.avatar, a.sample, a.tags, a.owner_type, a.host_type, a.impl_type, a.worker_agent_type, a.catalog_id, a.man_org_id, a.man_user_id, a.resource_status, a.resource_code, b.resource_id, b.agent_type, b.agent_dev_type, b.agent_sse_head, b.agent_sse_url, b.agent_web_url, b.agent_admin_url_list, b.prologue, b.agent_sse_url_ori, b.agent_web_url_ori, b.agent_admin_url_ori_list, b.create_type, b.agent_home_url, b.home_type, b.auth_type, b.integration_type, b.ability, b.constraints, b.faqs, b.role_attributes, b.processing_flow, b.personality_dimensions, b.word_preferences, b.sentence_and_tone, b.terminal, b.tag_name, b.skills, b.core_competencies, b.open_super_helper, b.machine_channel, b.core_persona_definition, b.advanced_settings, b.target_content from ss_resource a left join ss_res_ext_dig_employee b on a.resource_id = b.resource_id where a.resource_id =#{resourceId}

SELECT a.resource_id, a.resource_code, a.system_code, a.resource_source_pk_id, a.resource_biz_type, a.resource_type, a.resource_name, a.resource_desc, a.avatar, a.sample, a.tags, a.resource_version_id, a.host_type, a.catalog_id, a.man_org_id, a.man_user_id, a.index_list, a.create_by, a.create_time, a.update_by, a.update_time, a.com_acct_id, a.resource_status, a.resource_d_verid, a.resource_r_verid, a.auth_status, a.publish_time, a.shelf_time, a.unshelf_time, a.publish_portal, b.resource_id, b.agent_type, b.agent_dev_type, b.agent_sse_head, b.agent_sse_url, b.agent_web_url, b.agent_admin_url_list, b.prologue, b.agent_home_url, b.home_type, b.agent_sse_url_ori, b.agent_web_url_ori, b.agent_admin_url_ori_list, b.create_type, b.auth_type, b.integration_type, b.ability, b.constraints, b.faqs, b.role_attributes, b.processing_flow, b.personality_dimensions, b.word_preferences, b.sentence_and_tone, b.terminal, b.core_competencies, b.machine_channel FROM ss_resource a LEFT JOIN ss_res_ext_dig_employee b ON a.resource_id = b.resource_id WHERE a.resource_biz_type = 'DIG_EMPLOYEE' AND a.resource_id IN
#{item}

SELECT a.resource_id, a.resource_code, a.system_code, a.resource_source_pk_id, a.resource_biz_type, a.resource_type, a.resource_name, a.resource_desc, a.avatar, a.sample, a.tags, a.resource_version_id, a.host_type, a.catalog_id, a.man_org_id, a.man_user_id, a.index_list, a.create_by, a.create_time, a.update_by, a.update_time, a.com_acct_id, a.resource_status, a.resource_d_verid, a.resource_r_verid, a.auth_status, a.publish_time, a.shelf_time, a.unshelf_time, a.publish_portal, b.resource_id, b.agent_type, b.agent_dev_type, b.agent_sse_head, b.agent_sse_url, b.agent_web_url, b.agent_admin_url_list, b.prologue, b.agent_home_url, b.home_type, b.agent_sse_url_ori, b.agent_web_url_ori, b.agent_admin_url_ori_list, b.create_type, b.auth_type, b.integration_type, b.ability, b.constraints, b.faqs, b.role_attributes, b.processing_flow, b.personality_dimensions, b.word_preferences, b.sentence_and_tone, b.terminal, b.core_competencies, b.machine_channel FROM ss_resource a LEFT JOIN ss_res_ext_dig_employee b ON a.resource_id = b.resource_id WHERE a.resource_biz_type = 'DIG_EMPLOYEE' AND a.resource_status = 2
AND b.machine_channel like concat('%', #{machineChannel}, '%')
ORDER BY a.resource_id

select a.resource_id, a.system_code, a.resource_biz_type, a.resource_type, a.resource_name, a.resource_desc, a.avatar, a.sample, a.tags, a.host_type, a.impl_type, a.worker_agent_type, a.catalog_id, a.man_org_id, a.man_user_id, a.resource_status, a.resource_code, b.resource_id, b.agent_type, b.agent_dev_type, b.agent_sse_head, b.agent_sse_url, b.agent_web_url, b.agent_admin_url_list, b.prologue, b.agent_sse_url_ori, b.agent_web_url_ori, b.agent_admin_url_ori_list, b.create_type, b.agent_home_url, b.home_type, b.auth_type, b.integration_type, b.ability, b.constraints, b.faqs, b.role_attributes, b.processing_flow, b.personality_dimensions, b.word_preferences, b.sentence_and_tone, b.terminal, b.tag_name, b.skills, b.core_competencies, b.open_super_helper, b.machine_channel, b.core_persona_definition, b.advanced_settings from ss_resource a left join ss_res_ext_dig_employee b on a.resource_id = b.resource_id
and a.resource_biz_type = 'DIG_EMPLOYEE' and a.resource_status = 2
and b.agent_type = #{agentType}
and a.resource_name like concat('%', #{resourceName}, '%')
order by a.create_time desc
